user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Contoso Ltd.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 09:07 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with competitive positioning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 15:44 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Contoso Ltd competitive positioning

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 13:46 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Contoso Ltd
Date: 2024-01-17
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), David (Contoso Ltd)

[00:01:15] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is competitive positioning.

[00:06:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] David (Contoso Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:15:00] David (Contoso Ltd): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:19:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:21:00] David (Contoso Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:23:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:26:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:30:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.
